channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital: IHC Investment Completed, Enters New Era
item.description:
Sammaan Capital Ltd. has announced the completion of International Holding Company PJSC (IHC) investment and Open Offer, marking a new era for the company as it becomes an IHC Group Company. IHC, now the promoter and controlling shareholder, brings capital depth, operational expertise, and improved market perception. IHC's investment is expected to strengthen corporate governance and provide access to technology and AI ecosystems. The Board has noted the classification of IHC as a promoter and appointed Mr. Alwyn Dinesh Crasta as an Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director.

  • IHC's investment and Open Offer in Sammaan Capital are complete.
  • Sammaan Capital is now an IHC Group Company, with IHC as promoter.
  • Rating agencies have upgraded Sammaan Capital's ratings.
  • Alwyn Dinesh Crasta appointed as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director.
  • IHC's AI ecosystem to support Sammaan Capital's innovation and growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital Enters New Era Post IHC Investment
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sammaan Capital Ltd. has entered a new era following the completion of International Holding Company PJSC (IHC) investment and open offer. IHC now serves as the promoter and controlling shareholder. IHC, with a market capitalization of approximately USD 232 billion and total assets of USD 117 billion, views India as a top strategic market, positioning Sammaan Capital as the anchor of Avalora Holdings, IHC's financial services platform. This association is expected to bring capital depth, operational expertise, improved brand perception, higher governance standards, and access to technology and AI ecosystems.

  • IHC's investment makes it the promoter and controlling shareholder of Sammaan Capital.
  • Sammaan Capital is now the anchor of IHC's Avalora Holdings for financial services.
  • Rating agencies have upgraded Sammaan Capital's ratings following IHC investment.
  • Alwyn Dinesh Crasta appointed as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director.
  • IHC's AI ecosystem is expected to support Sammaan Capital's innovation and growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ABDL] Allied Blenders: Related Party Transactions for HY Ended Mar'26
item.description:
Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd disclosed related party transactions for the half-year ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. Key transactions include loans, interest received, advances, investments, and sale of goods/services with related parties like ABD Dwellings Private Limited and ABD Maestro Private Limited. Other transactions include royalty fees, office rent, job work charges, sharing SAP license fees, shared resources cost, transfer of leave encashment and gratuity, prepaid insurance premium, and interest paid to key management personnel.

  • Allied Blenders discloses related party transactions for HY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Transactions include loans to ABD Dwellings and Deccan Star Distilleries.
  • Investments made in ABD Maestro Private Limited worth ₹2,800 Lakhs.
  • Interest of ₹1,006.95 Lakhs paid to key management personnel, Bina K Chhabria.
  • Sales of goods/services to ABD Maestro Private Limited amounted to ₹873.08 Lakhs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [CENTUM] Centum Electronics: No Deviation in QIP Proceeds Utilization
item.description:
Centum Electronics Ltd. reported no deviation or variation in the utilization of proceeds from its Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP) as of March 31, 2026. The QIP, which raised ₹2,100 million on March 13, 2025, was intended for repayment of borrowings, capital expenditure, and general corporate purposes. Crisil Ratings Limited is the monitoring agency. The Audit Committee reviewed and the Board took on record the statement of deviation at meetings held on May 13 and 14, 2026.

  • Centum Electronics reports no deviation in QIP proceeds utilization as of March 31, 2026.
  • QIP raised ₹2,100 million on March 13, 2025, for debt repayment, capex, and corporate purposes.
  • Audit Committee reviewed and Board approved the statement of deviation.
  • Original allocation for debt repayment was ₹1,149.92 million, with no deviation.
  • Crisil Ratings Limited is the monitoring agency for the QIP proceeds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTUM ELECTRONICS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ABDL] Allied Blenders FY26 EBITDA Up 25.8% to ₹568 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd (ABD) reported its FY26 results, achieving record annual EBITDA of ₹568 crore, a 25.8% increase YoY, and PAT of ₹220 crore, up 13.0% YoY. Q4FY26 also saw record EBITDA of ₹182 crore, up 21.2% YoY. The Board has recommended a dividend of 270%, which is ₹5.4 per equity share. Income from Operations for FY26 stood at ₹3,949 crore, an 11.5% increase compared to FY25. The company's Prestige & Above (P&A) portfolio saw strong growth, with ICONiQ White surpassing the 10 million case milestone.

  • FY26 EBITDA reached ₹568 crore, up 25.8% YoY.
  • FY26 PAT increased by 13.0% YoY to ₹220 crore.
  • Q4FY26 EBITDA rose 21.2% YoY to ₹182 crore.
  • Board recommends a dividend of ₹5.4 per share (270%).
  • Income from Operations for FY26 grew 11.5% to ₹3,949 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [CELLA] Cella Space Sells Vijay Logistics Parks for ₹16.33 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cella Space Ltd has completed the 100% sale of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Vijay Logistics Parks Private Limited, to Aura Space Industrial Warehousing Private Limited. The sale agreement was entered on March 18, 2026, and completed on May 14, 2026. The consideration received from the sale is ₹16,32,87,161. The buyer is not part of the promoter group, and the transaction is not a related party transaction.

  • Cella Space sold its subsidiary, Vijay Logistics Parks, to Aura Space.
  • The sale consideration amounted to ₹16,32,87,161.
  • The sale agreement was finalized on March 18, 2026, and completed on May 14, 2026.
  • The buyer is not related to Cella Space's promoter group.
  • The transaction is not categorized as a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cella Space Ltd | Category: Divestment

item.title: [CENTUM] Centum Electronics Approves FY26 Audited Results, ₹5 Dividend
item.description:
Centum Electronics Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹5 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the allotment of 18,033 equity shares under the Centum Restricted Stock Unit Plan 2021 and re-appointed KPMG Assurance and Consulting Services, LLP as Internal Auditor and M/s. K.S. Kamalakara & Co. as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.

  • Approved audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹5 per share (50%) subject to shareholder approval.
  • Approved allotment of 18,033 equity shares under the Centum Restricted Stock Unit Plan 2021.
  • Re-appointed KPMG Assurance and Consulting Services, LLP as Internal Auditor.
  • Re-appointed M/s. K.S. Kamalakara & Co. as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTUM ELECTRONICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PNGJL] PNG Jewellers: Gross Margin Dilution of ~230 bps in Q4 FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd reports a gross margin contraction of approximately 230 basis points for Q4 FY26 compared to Q4 FY25. This was attributed to a higher share of gold bars and coins in the sales mix, lower contribution from studded jewellery, and increased trade discounts. Sequentially, gross margins moderated due to increased franchise sales, a higher share of gold bars and coins, a lower studded jewellery ratio, a favorable base effect from antique jewellery in Q3 FY26, and higher trade discounts.

  • Q4 FY26 gross margins contracted by ~230 bps YoY due to shifts in product mix.
  • Gold bars & coins sales increased to ~40% of revenue in Q4 FY26, impacting margins.
  • Studded jewellery contribution decreased, diluting consolidated margins by ~30 bps.
  • Higher trade discounts and market-expansion offers diluted gross margin by ~50 bps.
  • Sequential margin moderation was influenced by franchise sales and base effects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ADANIGREEN] Adani Green: US SEC, Adani File for Final Judgment
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Green Energy Ltd. provided an update on the civil complaint filed by the US SEC against Gautam Adani and Sagar Adani. The US SEC, Gautam Adani, and Sagar Adani have jointly filed a request for entry of final judgment, on consent, before the US Eastern District NY Court on May 15, 2026 (India Time). The final judgment is currently awaited. Gautam Adani and Sagar Adani have consented to the entry of the final judgment without admitting or denying the allegations and will pay civil penalties of USD 6.00 million and USD 12.00 million respectively. Adani Green Energy is not a party to this proceeding.

  • US SEC, Gautam Adani, and Sagar Adani jointly filed for final judgment.
  • Gautam and Sagar Adani consent to the judgment without admitting allegations.
  • Gautam Adani to pay USD 6.00 million civil penalty.
  • Sagar Adani to pay USD 12.00 million civil penalty.
  • Adani Green Energy is not a party to the US SEC proceeding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Green Energy Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [INDIGRID] IndiGrid: Audited FY26 Financials Approved
item.description:
IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust has disclosed its audited standalone and consolidated financial information along with audit reports for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The financials were approved by the Board of IndiGrid Investment Managers Limited on May 14, 2026. The audit report, conducted by SR BC & CO LLP, provides an opinion that the consolidated financial statements give a true and fair view in conformity with InvIT Regulations and Indian Accounting Standards.

  • IndiGrid discloses audited standalone and consolidated financials for FY26.
  • Financials approved by IndiGrid Investment Managers Limited on May 14, 2026.
  • Audit conducted by SR BC & CO LLP.
  • Auditor's opinion states financials conform to InvIT Regulations and Ind AS.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust | Category: Quarterly Result
